mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.major_id, c.teacher_user_id, c.grade, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.student_count, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as confirmed_count, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as not_found_count, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_offer_count, t.name as teacher_name FROM class c LEFT JOIN student_users s ON c.id = s.class_id LEFT JOIN student_internship_status sis ON s.id = sis.student_id LEFT JOIN teacher_users t ON c.teacher_user_id = t.teacher_user_id WHERE c.id = #{id} GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.major_id, c.teacher_user_id, c.grade, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.student_count, t.name

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.major_id, c.teacher_user_id, c.grade, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.student_count, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as confirmed_count, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as not_found_count, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_offer_count, t.name as teacher_name FROM class c LEFT JOIN student_users s ON c.id = s.class_id LEFT JOIN student_internship_status sis ON s.id = sis.student_id LEFT JOIN teacher_users t ON c.teacher_user_id = t.teacher_user_id GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.major_id, c.teacher_user_id, c.grade, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.student_count, t.name ORDER BY c.update_time DESC

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.major_id, c.teacher_user_id, c.grade, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.student_count, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as confirmed_count, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as not_found_count, SUM(CASE WHEN sis.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_offer_count, t.name as teacher_name FROM class c LEFT JOIN student_users s ON c.id = s.class_id LEFT JOIN student_internship_status sis ON s.id = sis.student_id LEFT JOIN teacher_users t ON c.teacher_user_id = t.teacher_user_id WHERE c.major_id = #{majorId} GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.major_id, c.teacher_user_id, c.grade, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.student_count, t.name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO class (name, major_id, teacher_user_id, grade, student_count, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{majorId}, #{teacherId}, #{grade}, #{studentCount}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
update class
name = #{name},
major_id = #{majorId},
teacher_user_id = #{teacherId},
grade = #{grade},
student_count = #{studentCount},
update_time = #{updateTime}
where id = #{id}
